title: tricondylus ferrugineus
intro: Tricondylus ferrugineus, also known as the Rough Buckwheat or Tricondylus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Zygophyllaceae. It is primarily found in the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting immune function.
